items.text:
THE DREAM ENDS IN KANSAS CITY — BUT WHAT A RIDE, GHANA. 🇬🇭

The Black Stars are out of the World Cup after a 1-0 loss to Colombia in the round of 32. Jhon Arias struck early, and on a sweltering night at Arrowhead Stadium, Ghana could not find a reply.

But look at what this team gave us: a win over Panama, a goalless draw against England, and a place in the knockout rounds against the odds.

The boys came, they fought, and they carried the flag into the last 32 of the world. That matters.

(Source: ESPN | FIFA | GBC)
#GreaterNews #Ghana #BlackStars #WorldCup2026

Chale, be honest — did this team make you proud? 🖤⭐

Black Stars out of the 2026 World Cup — Colombia 1-0 in the round of 32. Arias scored early; Ghana had no shot on target. Still: a win over Panama and a draw with England. Hold your heads high. (Source: ESPN/FIFA) #GreaterNews #BlackStars #WorldCup2026

WHERE IS THE CEDI AS THE SECOND HALF OF 2026 BEGINS? HERE ARE THE NUMBERS.

The cedi opened July at about GH¢12.35 to the dollar on the retail forex market — and GH¢11.36 on the official interbank — before settling around GH¢12.25 by the end of the first week.

The bigger picture: the cedi has gained about 3.7% over the past month, but remains about 9.9% weaker than a year ago.

(Source: Modern Ghana | Pulse Ghana | TradingEconomics)
#GreaterNews #Ghana #Cedi #GhanaEconomy

How are the rates affecting your business right now? 💬

Cedi check, first week of July: ~GH¢12.25–12.35 to the dollar on the forex market, GH¢11.36–11.40 interbank. Up ~3.7% on the month, down ~9.9% on the year. (Source: Modern Ghana/TradingEconomics) #GreaterNews #Ghana #Cedi
